title: Background - Cherry Grove
description: This resource pack changes the background
body:
This resource pack replaces the default background of the Minecraft main menu with a new, customized background. It focuses solely on the visual appearance of the menu, leaving all gameplay elements untouched.

You may want to download this pack if you want a fresh look for your game’s main menu or if you prefer a different atmosphere when starting Minecraft. It can make your game feel more personalized and unique right from the moment you launch it.

Shader used in screenshot: Kappa
